cleavage agent: Trypsin-digested using an in-gel trypsin digestion kit
collision energy: with a normalized collision energy (NCE) of 30 for confirmation of peptide sequences
fragmentation method: data-dependent higher energy collisional dissociation MS2 scans
instrument: an Orbitrap Fusion™ Lumos™ Tribrid™ mass spectrometer
ionization type: The EASY-Spray™ ion source spray voltage was set to 1800 V positive ion
